description: You are the scheduling administrator at Northbridge Organization. The CFO's office has flagged that the 'Investor Update Preparation' meeting details — including sensitive information about Q2 investor update materials and talking points — are currently visible to everyone, including external contacts who have shared calendar access. Update the 'Investor Update Preparation' calendar event to change the Privacy setting to 'Only Internal Users' and the Show As (availability) setting to 'Free'.
